artPrompt: A characterful portrait of a hunched goblin advisor in green eyeshade and rolled sleeves, perched on a stool over a card table stacked with worn unmarked ledgers, licking a clawed finger to turn a blank page while sliding a second secret book beneath his elbow. A single amber lamp pools light on the columns, cigar smoke drifting. Mono-black noir of ink shadow and smoky brown, sly criminal bookkeeping, composed wide in a 4:3 landscape frame, rendered as a vibrant gouache storybook illustration — saturated matte color, simplified flat-ish shapes, soft painterly edges, decorative.
name: Goblin Bookkeeper
text:
When Goblin Bookkeeper enters the battlefield, scry 2.
{2}, {T}: You create a Favor token. He invents a debt out of thin air and writes it down in pen. That makes it real.
flavorText: Two sets of books: one for the auditors, one that's accurate, and a third he hides from the other two.
